updates.title: Telegram Intelligence Tool — Autonomous Channel Discovery & Monitoring
architecture: Tier 1: web search (Brave API / DuckDuckGo) + t.me/s/ web preview validation
Tier 2: Telethon MTProto user account (requires _setup_telegram_session.py once)
Core integration: _process_telegram_intel_directives() in both chat paths
WakeupProtocol: _get_telegram_intel_context() — status injected every API call
api.py: wired into framework + wakeup; 7 REST endpoints at /xdart/telegram/intel/*
Capabilities manifest: Capability #19 in system prompt
Config: TELEGRAM_API_ID, TELEGRAM_API_HASH, TELEGRAM_SESSION_NAME in config.py + .env
actions: search: discover Telegram channels by topic via web search + t.me/s/ validation
add: validate + add a channel to live monitoring (hot-reload into DarkWebCollector)
remove: remove a channel from monitoring
list: show all dynamically monitored channels
read: read recent messages from a channel's public web preview (Tier 1)
telethon_search: Telegram native channel search (Tier 2 — requires setup)
telethon_read: read full channel history + inject into DirtyPool (Tier 2)
usage_examples: <TELEGRAM_INTEL action="search" query="APT Lazarus C2 infrastructure" limit="5" />
tier1_notes: Uses web search (Brave or DuckDuckGo) to find candidate t.me/ handles
Validates each candidate: GET t.me/s/{handle} with follow_redirects=False
Channels that redirect (HTTP 302) have disabled web preview — skipped
Channels returning HTTP 200 with tgme_widget_message_text are valid
DarkWebCollector._dynamic_channels hot-updated — signals collected next cycle
tier2_notes: Capabilities: join private channels, read full history, Telegram native search
All Tier 2 reads inject messages directly into DirtyPool for triage
ethical_constraints: Only monitors PUBLIC channels (web preview or publicly searchable)
Does not infiltrate private groups or individual accounts
All collected signals pass through DirtyPool → LLM triage (same as Dark Wing)
Dark signal integrity rules (Capability #17) apply to all Telegram Intel signals

updates.title: Physical PC Access via SystemControl
architecture: Core integration: core init + context injection + docs + directive parsing
Execution paths wired in streaming and non-streaming chat post-processors
Action logs persisted through system control journal hooks
actions: open_app, open_file, open_url, list_windows, focus_window, close_window
write_file, append_file, create_dir, delete_file, copy_file, move_file

updates.title: Self-Modification Engine
architecture: Core integration: init + context + docs + directive parser
Execution paths wired in streaming and non-streaming chat post-processors

updates.title: External API Management
architecture: Auth profile support: token_env + header + prefix
Core integration: init + context + docs + directive parser

updates.title: Workflow Engine / Scheduler
architecture: Background loop thread: tick-based due-run execution
Supported workflow kinds: shell, python, external_api
Core integration: init + context + docs + directive parser
usage_examples: <WORKFLOW action="create_workflow" name="health_check" kind="shell" payload="python healthcheck.py" interval_seconds="600" />

smoke_tests: external_api_manager request to https://api.github.com returned status 200
telegram_intel_tool tier1 search + add + list + remove tested OK
